title: Secure steward adoption + >=1 documented citation/use
context: An open, source-linked map of the Ewing Sarcoma research ecosystem (organizations, grants/awards, research efforts, aggregate registered-study records, and public outputs). Project 'shipped' requires a named steward committing to adopt/host/cite the map plus >=1 documented downstream use.
objective: Secure a named advocacy/research steward's commitment to adopt/host and cite the map, and document >=1 concrete citation or downstream use.
acceptanceCriteria: A named advocacy/research steward commits to adopt/host and cite the map.
>=1 concrete citation or downstream use is documented.
output: docs/steward-adoption.md recording steward commitment + documented use, committed via PR.
